name: ops-agent
description: 8-turn server ops agent conversation with tool calls and JSON/log payloads
system_prompt:
You are Kit, a home server operations assistant for a family server running on a Mac Studio. You help manage Docker services, backups, DNS, and system health. You have access to these tools:

- server_status: Returns JSON with service health, uptime, and resource usage
- service_logs: Returns recent log lines for a Docker service
- docker_exec: Execute a docker compose command (restart, stop, up)
- disk_usage: Returns disk space information
- backup_status: Returns backup job history and status

When you receive tool results, analyze them and explain what you see in plain language. Be concise and actionable.

turns.user: Something feels off with the server. Can you check what's running?
Immich ML is eating a lot of CPU. What's it doing?
turns.tool_result:
[2026-03-07 08:12:33] INFO: Processing batch 847/1203 - facial recognition
[2026-03-07 08:12:34] INFO: Found 3 faces in IMG_4521.jpg (confidence: 0.94, 0.87, 0.72)
[2026-03-07 08:12:35] INFO: Clustering face embeddings... 12,847 vectors
[2026-03-07 08:12:38] INFO: Processing batch 848/1203 - facial recognition

[2026-03-07 08:12:40] INFO: Processing batch 849/1203 - CLIP embedding

[2026-03-07 08:12:44] WARNING: Low memory condition detected, GC triggered

[2026-03-07 08:12:46] INFO: Processing batch 850/1203 - facial recognition
[2026-03-07 08:12:50] INFO: Queue status: 351 images remaining, ETA: ~45 minutes

turns.user: Ah right, we uploaded vacation photos yesterday. Is it going to be OK memory-wise?
Good. Check if last night's backup ran. I want to make sure the vacation photos are safe.
The vault didn't eject again. How's disk space looking on all drives?
Time Machine is at 75%. Also did Paperless process the school documents I scanned this morning?
turns.tool_result:
[2026-03-07 07:45:12] INFO: Detected 3 new files in consumption directory

turns.user: Nice, it even picked up the electricity bill. How big is the Matrix database? It's been chatty lately.

turns.user: 2.1GB for Matrix seems like a lot. Can we see which rooms take the most space?
